title: Ektra
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ektra''', which was also known as '''Ektra City''', was one of many cities of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]], and was one of the many floating cities found just above the surface of the planet. The [[CarsinShare]] and [[Nonsu]] corporations had offices there and they controlled a gladiatorial arena in the bowels of the city where gladiators such as [[Lowal Pulse]] would fight.  The losers of the fight may be kicked out of the bottom of the floating city through a hole in the floor.<ref name="Coruscant and the Core Worlds">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref> 

==History==
It was located above the [[Moridebo district|Moridebo District]]. In [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] [[Mission to Metellos|apprehended]] the criminal [[Dreed Pommel]], who had taken a young five-year-old girl named [[Claria Labreezle]] hostage, in Labreezle's family's suite in Ektra.

==Sources==
